windows.embed_text_v2: Finished decorative candles on display intro, honeycomb rolled beeswax pillar candles red purple with aronia berries, lit sail-shaped marbled art candle twin flame, romantic red table styling
windows.summary_v2: Video intro montage of finished decorative candles being displayed: honeycomb beeswax pillars with berries, then a lit sail-shaped art candle in a romantic red table setting.

tags_v2.setting: dark stone surface then romantic red table

seconds_v2.desc: Two honeycomb-textured rolled beeswax pillar candles stand on a dark stone surface: a red one lit with a flame and a taller purple one unlit, with clusters of dark aronia berries and autumn leaves at their base.
Same pair of honeycomb pillar candles, red one burning, purple unlit, styled with berries and leaves against a moody grey backdrop.
Static beauty shot of the red (lit) and purple textured beeswax pillars with the berry-and-leaf arrangement.
The two honeycomb-pattern pillar candles continue to display, the red flame flickering, dark berries in the foreground.
Closer view of the red and purple rolled-beeswax pillars with honeycomb texture, lit red candle, berries and leaves alongside.
Scene change to a romantic red table setting: a sail-shaped cream-and-red marbled art candle with two lit wicks sits on a mirror, beside cordial glasses and a pink orchid against a red wall.
The twin-flame sail-shaped decorative candle burns on the red table, wine glasses and orchid plant in the warm-lit background.
Same styled shot of the two-flame red-marbled art candle glowing on its mirror base in the romantic red-themed setting.
Final intro beauty shot of the lit sail-shaped decorative candle with two flames, glassware and orchid framing the cozy red scene.

seconds_v2.desc: Four marbled twisted taper candles in cream, teal and grey swirls stand lit on a glittering dark surface, three flames glowing, a bokeh background behind them.
Same cluster of swirled spiral taper candles burning, the marbled cream-and-teal pattern visible, sparkly surface beneath.
Static beauty shot of the four twisted marbled tapers with lit wicks on the glittery tabletop.
Scene change to three grey distressed-finish pillar candles of stepped heights on a white tray, each with a faux LED flame, beside a white vase of cotton stems and red berries.
The three rustic grey pillar candles glow on the tray, cotton-branch arrangement at right against a textured pale wall.
Same display of the trio of grey textured LED pillar candles with the cotton-and-berry decor.
Unchanged styled shot of the three grey pillar candles and cotton stems on the white tray.
The grey distressed pillar candles continue to display with their flickering faux flames and the cotton arrangement.
Scene change to three ornate white tiered wedding-cake-shaped candles lit in a clear glass dish, set among soft pink decor and ribbon.

seconds_v2.desc: Three ornate white tiered candles shaped like frosted wedding cakes burn in a clear footed glass dish, surrounded by soft pink decor, ribbon and a wrapped gift in the blurred background.
Same trio of white cake-shaped candles with lit wicks in the glass dish, intricate piped detailing visible on each tier.

The ornate white tiered candles continue to glow, three small flames atop the decorative wax cakes.
Closer view of the white cake candles burning in the glass dish, lacy white relief patterns on the sides.
Scene change to three blue-and-white cloud-textured pillar candles lit on a fluffy white blanket against a dark background, each with a small flame.
The three sky-blue pillar candles with white cloud relief continue to burn on the soft white surface.
Same display of the blue cloud-patterned pillar candles, flames glowing, arranged at staggered heights.

tags_v2.setting: white table with ivy then festive holiday scene

seconds_v2.desc: Two white flower-shaped candles, one a cream rose and one a white peony, burn among trailing green ivy leaves on a white tablecloth, soft flames glowing in their carved centres.
Same pair of white blossom candles lit amid the ivy, petals sculpted in pale wax, a purple bloom blurred at right.
Static beauty shot of the rose and peony flower candles burning with green foliage around them.
The two white flower-form candles continue to glow softly, ivy leaves draped between them.
Closer view of the lit peony-shaped candle in front and rose-shaped candle behind, nestled in greenery.
Scene change to three pinecone-shaped wax candles in graduated sizes lit in a dark wooden dish, with real pinecones beside them and a snowy, fairy-lit Christmas backdrop.
The trio of pinecone candles burns warmly in the wooden tray, detailed scaly texture catching the light against the festive bokeh.
Same styled shot of the three lit pinecone candles and loose pinecones on the reflective surface.
Final intro beauty shot of the pinecone-shaped candles glowing in the dish before the frosted, twinkle-lit holiday scene.
